details.test: Task 1: Set up monthly Youth Scholarship Fund donation
Task 2: Register for Main Campus weekday evening audition
Task 3: Submit need-based tuition scholarship application
Task 4: Purchase tickets for December Holiday Concert
Task 5: Sign up for Saturday volunteer usher shift
Task 6: Choose ensemble and start registration
Task 7: Subscribe to newsletter with specific interests and monthly frequency
Task 8: Reserve free adult workshop downtown next month
